title: NJPW Wrestle Kingdom 13
overview: Wrestle Kingdom 13 in Tokyo Dome was a professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) event produced by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW), which took place at the Tokyo Dome in Tokyo, Japan on January 4, 2019, headlined by Kenny Omega (c) vs. Hiroshi Tanahashi for the IWGP Heavyweight Championship.
